channel.title: +Articles on hindu-vichArAH हिन्दु-विचाराः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on hindu-vichArAH हिन्दु-विचाराः

item.title: 2006 anti-v1-campaign
item.description: Source: TW After IMK broke the EVR Statue in Srirangam set off an unprecedented chain of violence against hindu temples and brahmins in the state (Dec 2006). This is unreported or under-reported in the national or tamil news media till date. Ayodhya Mandapam attacked with Petrol and Acid bombs. Sri Ram Samaj also known as Ayodhya Mandapam is a well known Ram temple and religious centre in the heart of Chennai in West Mambalam.

item.title: Dravidoid fake atrocity stories
item.description: Source : Suren EVR fakes However, one particular alleged incident in Kasi had a profound impact on Ramasamy’s ideology and future work. At the worship site, there were free meals offered to guests. To Ramasamy’s shock, he was refused meals at choultries, which exclusively fed Brahmins. Due to extreme hunger, Ramasamy felt compelled to enter one of the eateries disguised as a Brahmin with a sacred thread on his bare chest, but was betrayed by his moustache.
